input_context.decision_surface: Whether validators should keep supporting AMM activation after a pre-activation AMM bug surfaced.

source_facts.claim: AMM adds native automated market maker functionality integrated with the XRPL DEX.
Contemporaneous reporting said the AMM amendment had reached required validator consensus on 2024-02-01, then validators revoked Yes votes after the bug surfaced.
The relevant decision surface is pre-activation bug handling, not the later terminal AMM enablement.

input_context.state_question: Classify the dated XRPL amendment state using the supplied source facts.
